info.title: Genrenator API
info.description: The Genrenator API generates random music genres and genre-related stories based on various fragments of attributes such as instruments and adjectives. It features endpoints for both genre and genre story requests, allowing developers to retrieve unique genre information programmatically. The API uses catalogs of genre fragments including instruments, beats, adjectives, prefixes and suffixes, regions, and genres to create unique combinations.

get.description: Returns a single randomly generated music genre string
Returns an array of randomly generated music genre strings. The count parameter specifies how many genres to generate.
Returns a single randomly generated story about a music genre

200.description: Successfully generated a random genre story

schema.example: In the underground clubs of Berlin, a new sound emerged combining electronic beats with traditional folk instruments.

get.description: Returns an array of randomly generated stories about music genres. The count parameter specifies how many stories to generate.

200.description: Successfully generated multiple random genre stories

example: In the underground clubs of Berlin, a new sound emerged combining electronic beats with traditional folk instruments.
A group of musicians in Tokyo pioneered a fusion of ambient soundscapes and traditional percussion.
The genre was born in the late night jazz clubs where experimental artists pushed boundaries.

tags.name: Genre
tags.description: Endpoints for generating random music genres

tags.name: Story
tags.description: Endpoints for generating random stories about music genres
